Derek | d3rLord3 Lives (Searching For A World That Doesn't Exist)
summary: Derek was real. Despite what his therapist and his roommates say, Avery knows he didn't just imagine everything that happened that night. Which is why he knows that Derek's stolen footage, taken by the "US D.M.S.", isn't something he should ignore.What if he had been wrong to give up after reading that letter? What if Derek is still alive?
